reviews.review_description:
You literally get free finger painter,Admin badge and moderator stick
But besides that it’s in the Halloween update,and everyone knows the ghosts who drop flowers in gorilla tag,well they have the flowers in this game and you can grab them,AWSOME five stars ⭐️One last thing you get a camera mod,to use it you record a video on the camera NOT your VR once your done recording go to your files then go to media then you should find it.I think that’s how you use a camera mod in any game

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: So I joined a lobby and I heard someone say DLLER aka a person who hacks the game and as soon as he said that I got banned forever can someone please unban me I love this game but it just perma banned me for life for no reason

This game is awesome I love the custom stuff the mods, and the cam mod everything in perfect btw can I get mod? I’m a great moderator I’m a co owner in this game called project cleaning and the owner says I’m great. So please owner if your reading this please can I have mod.
I don’t know why but the camera LIV is not working it dosent send to the quest app but very good game in general definitely should get it.

So I was just playing normally with mosa boost and apparently I was using speed boost now. I only know to use that in city so I continue playing around. Someone said I turned it off, which I have no idea what I turned off, and then I got banned for 48 hours￼.
I love this game because all the moderators are chill and they give mod reqently and finger painter and all you have to do to get mod is to apply in the discord.

reviews.review_title: The game is good but the moderator are n
reviews.review_description: The game is good but I got banned for using mods but the game gives you mods I don’t understand I didn’t Ben toxic to other players
I just got this game 1 week ago I see a Moderator ￼ I got banned I don’t remember his name

Like the camera mod is very good and I really like the mods if you don't know where to find the videos you recorded go on quest and go to browser search up media fire log in and the videos should be in the file I think
An amazing game and a lot of cool mods, this deserve 5 stars
This game is the BEST fan game with moderators actually patrolling and me and my friend loved the camera mod and played around with the stick
Your moderator wings banned me because my name was happy not h4kpy just happy and now I can't play the game so not to be a hater but he needs to have the stick taken away from him

I am FaZe aka a finger painter for this game this game is a 5 star game it is good the owners are nice they're arent Alot of toxic kids and modders if you see them tell them to turn it off and yea. Have Fun 
Sincerely FaZe ❤️
I got the admin badge and my friend is the owner

I love how it's a copy but better. It has the camera mod and everything which is what I need.
    
     Sad that the mod menus are gone like the banana OS watch but I'm still going to play it! It's amazing. Maybe could you (the dev) make your own menu that like attaches to your arm so that you can take it on the go?
      
     I might make a video explaining why people should get this. Above all, great game, can't wait for more updates 😃

     -Frxst

YT: FrxstOnGtag
       @frxstthemonke

reviews.review_title: Nice game! But it broke my headset
reviews.review_description: I clicked on a mod menu and my headset is frozen. I tried factory reset and it didn’t work but I eventually fixed it but the game is amazing
I was making a video with my friend and we were playing around says “we are moderators!” In the most doubtable way and a moderator came in while I said i was joking and banned me for 2 days
